timeline.title: Merge request opened
timeline.detail: The change introduces Array.prototype.toSorted() in billing code.

timeline.title: ReproGuard warning posted
timeline.detail: Found 2 reproducibility risks that may break CI or a clean developer environment.

timeline.title: Warning ignored and merged
timeline.detail: The risky merge request is merged without updating CI.

timeline.title: Pipeline failed
timeline.detail: test:unit fails with invoices.toSorted is not a function.

timeline.title: Prediction confirmed
timeline.detail: The failure signature matches the Node 20 API mismatch predicted before merge.

timeline.title: Fix bundle generated
timeline.detail: Generated a minimal fix bundle for the confirmed Node runtime mismatch.

riskReport.summary: Found 2 reproducibility risks that may break CI or a clean developer environment.

risks.title: Node 20 API introduced while CI still runs Node 18

causalAnalysis.rootCause: CI is running Node 18 while the merge request introduces Array.prototype.toSorted(), which requires Node 20.
